title: ClipSpec v1
description: Deterministic, asset-addressed contract for compiling an AI-authored edit into an immutable render plan.

Rate.description: Exact rational. In Time and Duration, one tick is num/den seconds.

NormalizedPoint.description: Canvas-relative coordinates in basis points; 0 is top/left and 10000 is bottom/right.

Extensions.description: Namespaced vendor escape hatch. Keys must be stable vendor namespaces, never unqualified field names.

StorageLocator.description: Server-resolved immutable object location. Public or signed URIs are intentionally forbidden.

Bezier.description: Cubic Bezier control points in basis points over the unit square.

EmojiGraphic.description: Emoji rendering is asset-backed for deterministic glyph appearance.
